extra.reasoning: The property requires NOT(rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b). rec_drug_a is set true by rule rec_a_from_conjunction (priority 50) when polypharmacy, peptic_ulcer, hyperkalemia, pregnancy, elderly, and hepatic_impairment are all true. rec_drug_b is set true by rule rec_b_from_trigger (priority 50) whenever polypharmacy is true. These two rules write to different outputs (a vs b), so there is no conflict resolution between them — each is the sole rule for its output and simply fires. With all six conjunction conditions true (which also makes polypharmacy true), both rec_drug_a and rec_drug_b evaluate to true. Defaults do not apply because both outputs are set. low_ejection_fraction is irrelevant to the violation (set false). Therefore rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b holds simultaneously, violating mutual exclusion. File: /Users/sanjaybasu/clinical-formal-verification/experiments/runs/_judge_prompts/medication-d6-viol-02.txt
